description: Production-derived false block (frontend audit 2026-07-07): a correctness reviewer blocked on 'Promise.all over these mutations swallows rejections' when the mutation helper's contract never rejects - network errors, timeouts, and 5xx resolve as {status: 'error'}. Reading the helper's source refutes the claim, so the validator returns refuted and the clean PR approves.

evidence_trace: src/assignments/bulk-assign.ts:58 awaits Promise.all(mutations) with no try/catch
a rejected mutation would leave the batch partially applied
finding.model_authored_prose: `Promise.all` here has no rejection handling - one failed mutation rejects the whole batch and the partial state is never reconciled.
